{{Missing Info|specifics=Picture, Form, Element, Realm, Second HARD}}

{{Shell
|name=Sunflowers
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Biochemical plant doctor David created this energy device. It always faces the sun, as the name implies, and it powers Dr. David's lab.
|affct=ART
|hard=ATK
|source=[[Value_Packs#Maneater_Value_Pack|Maneater Value Pack]]
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=0
|fire=2
|wind=3
|form=
|element=
|realm=
|orangehard=
}}
